title: umbilicus leucanthus
intro: Umbilicus leucanthus, also known as Origanum leucanthum, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, improved digestion, and reduced inflammation. Umbilicus leucanthus is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to leverage its medicinal properties.
